message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Facade Pattern Sequence Diagram

participant "Client" as Client
participant "Facade" as Facade
participant "SystemA" as SystemA
participant "SystemB" as SystemB
participant "SystemC" as SystemC

' Initialization Phase
activate Facade
Client -> Facade: 1 create
activate Facade
    Facade -> SystemA: 2 create
    activate SystemA
    deactivate SystemA
    
    Facade -> SystemB: 3 create
    activate SystemB
    deactivate SystemB
    
    Facade -> SystemC: 4 create
    activate SystemC
    deactivate SystemC
deactivate Facade

' Operation Phase
activate Facade
Client -> Facade: 5 wrapOpration()
activate Facade
    Facade -> SystemA: 6 operationA()
    activate SystemA
    deactivate SystemA
    
    Facade -> SystemB: 7 operationB()
    activate SystemB
    deactivate SystemB
    
    Facade -> SystemC: 8 operation()
    activate SystemC
    deactivate SystemC
deactivate Facade
deactivate Facade

@enduml
```
